description: Overflow clipping: overflow:hidden with basic box, border-radius, circle clip, nested larger child, nowrap text, overflow:visible comparison

must_contain_text: This is a much longer line

visual_assertions: The basic overflow:hidden box should clip text that extends beyond its 200x60px boundary
The rounded clip box should clip content to a rounded rectangle with 20px corner radius
The circle clip box should clip content to a circle shape (border-radius: 50%)
The nested overflow box should show only the portion of the inner 400x200 div that fits in the 250x100 container
The gradient background in the nested clip should be partially visible where not clipped
The nowrap overflow text box with 'This is a much longer line' should be clipped at the right edge
The overflow:visible div should show its text extending beyond the dashed yellow border
